assignments.name: text
assignments.value: ={{ $if($('Code in JavaScript').isExecuted, $('Code in JavaScript').item.json.text, $if($('Format Audio to Text').isExecuted, $('Format Audio to Text').item.json.messages[0].text.body, $('Edit Fields1').item.json.text || $('Edit Fields1').item.json.caption || '')) }}

assignments.name: message_type
assignments.value: ={{ $if($('Code in JavaScript').isExecuted, 'image', $if($('Format Audio to Text').isExecuted, 'audio', $('Edit Fields1').item.json.type)) }}

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook for Form Completion
Respond to Webhook for Form Initiation

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO table_7 (token, chat_id, expires_at)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3::timestamp)
ON CONFLICT (token) DO UPDATE 
column_2 EXCLUDED.chat_id,
    expires_at = EXCLUDED.expires_at,
    completed = FALSE;

SELECT chat_id, completed, expires_at
FROM table_7
column_3 $1
  column_4 FALSE
  column_5 NOW()
LIMIT 1;

parameters.text:
={{ $('Edit Fields1').item.json.caption 
   ? 'Analyze this image. The user wrote: "' + $('Edit Fields1').item.json.caption + '". ' 
   : 'Analyze this image. ' }}

Return ONLY a JSON object:
{
  "is_financial": boolean,
  "financial_type": "account_details" | "receipt" | "transfer_screenshot" | "balance_screenshot" | "none",
  "accounts": [{"account_number": "string", "bank_name": "string", "account_holder_name": "string or null"}],
  "count": number,
  "image_description": "brief description of what the image shows",
  "suggested_response_context": "what the user likely wants help with"
}

is_financial = true ONLY for: bank account numbers, receipts, transfer screenshots, balance screenshots, transaction records.
is_financial = false for: general photos, food, people, places, memes, casual images.

Nigerian banks: Access Bank, Zenith Bank, GTBank, First Bank, UBA, Sterling Bank, Ecobank, Fidelity Bank, FCMB, Stanbic IBTC, Union Bank, Keystone Bank, Polaris Bank, Wema Bank, Kuda Bank, Opay, Palmpay, Moniepoint.
